nodes.label: Rationale: Distribute students per semester (vs. aggregated) so groups of controlled size form and each rotation gets an IPS assignment that respects cupos
nodes.norm_label: rationale: distribute students per semester (vs. aggregated) so groups of controlled size form and each rotation gets an ips assignment that respects cupos

nodes.label: Rationale: Demanda and Rotaciones sheets are optional in DataLoader.load_all (graceful fallback to placeholder) — model can run with partial data

nodes.label: Rationale: validate_pesas requires sum of active weights = 1.0 (else ValueError) — guarantees score decomposition is a convex combination
nodes.norm_label: rationale: validate_pesas requires sum of active weights = 1.0 (else valueerror) — guarantees score decomposition is a convex combination

nodes.label: Rationale: GroupOptimizer uses Big-M style linking constraints (y <= max_group*x; y >= t - max_group*(1-x)) so binary x selects the IPS for a group and y carries student count
nodes.norm_label: rationale: groupoptimizer uses big-m style linking constraints (y <= max_group*x; y >= t - max_group*(1-x)) so binary x selects the ips for a group and y carries student count
